creator: samorosh@marmot.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
The makefile for the port of Mesa located in /pub/FreeBSD/ports/graphics/Mesa
attempts to retrieve Mesa-1.1.3beta.tar.gz via ftp.  This file does not
exist, the dist file Mesa-1.2.2.tar.gz does exist however.  This probably 
just needs to have a slight change in the Makefile.

How-To-Repeat: ftp ftp.cdrom.com
cd /pub/FreeBSD/ports/graphics
get Mesa.tar
tar xvf Mesa.tar
cd Mesa
make
